grant_and_term.term: 20 years from 1st day of month hotel opens
grant_and_term.renewal: 10-year successor franchise on then-current terms (may be materially different)
grant_and_term.extension_for_casualty: Term extends for period hotel is closed due to casualty

fee_obligations.world_of_hyatt: 4% of eligible revenue (2% for on-property enrollment)

non_curable: Cease operating or identifying Hotel with Marks
Contest IP ownership or register our IP
Violation of law (including trade restriction laws)

transfer_restrictions.transfer_fee: Then-current change of ownership application fee ($150,000)
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_offer: Only if Exhibit C signed (strategic markets)

noncompete.during_term: No covenant; but no Competing Brand Owner

guaranty_scope.type: Personal, by Controlling Ownership Interest holders
guaranty_scope.covers: All obligations — monetary and non-monetary, including confidentiality and arbitration
guaranty_scope.guarantor_monetary_threshold: Net worth and liquidity minimums, increasing annually by CPI

liquidated_damages.formula: min(36, remaining months) × (Avg Monthly GRR × 5% + Avg Monthly GRR × 3.5%)
liquidated_damages.casualty_termination: Lesser of liquidated damages or Net Recovery
liquidated_damages.condemnation_with_termination_agreement: No liquidated damages if signed; but $5,000/room if new select service hotel built in AOP within 24 months

dispute_resolution.venue: Within 10 miles of franchisor's principal address (Chicago, IL)
dispute_resolution.waiver_of_punitive_damages: Referenced in state riders as potentially modified

insurance_requirements.description: Must maintain adequate insurance in amounts franchisor periodically specifies. If franchisee fails, franchisor may obtain and charge premiums + costs + $200/room/year.

indemnification.description: Franchisee must indemnify franchisor and related parties for all claims arising from application, development, operation, breach, and Hotel's proportionate share of multi-hotel actions.

force_majeure.description: Casualty provisions address fire, flood, hurricane. If repair cost ≤ Damage Threshold (60% of market value or insurance proceeds), must repair within 4 months start / 24 months reopen. If exceeds Damage Threshold, may elect to terminate with Termination Agreement and pay lesser of liquidated damages or Net Recovery.

distinctive_clauses: Guarantor Monetary Threshold with CPI escalation — unusual minimum net worth and liquidity requirement for guarantors
Competing Brand Owner restriction — no traditional noncompete but prevents management by competing hotel brand affiliates
Right of First Offer (Exhibit C) — only in 'strategic markets' determined by franchisor
Mixed-Use Site restrictions — bars deriving >50% revenue from alcohol within 300 feet require approval
Guest Information as franchisor property during term — franchisee may retain post-term for Hotel-generated data subject to franchisor's data policies
Innovations (IP) created by franchisee are franchisor's property as work-for-hire
